articles.title: MBTA announces service changes, suspensions for various lines throughout May
articles.description:
A long list of closures will happen on the Red Line, Green Line, Blue Line, Mattapan Line, and some Commuter Rail lines.

The post MBTA announces service changes, suspensions for various lines throughout May appeared first on Boston.com.
